message.content:
### 1) Hero Section (Main Banner)  
The hero section is a **full-width carousel/slider** (with left/right navigation arrows) featuring a high-contrast, tech-focused design.  

- **Visual Elements**:  
  - **Background**: A textured, dark gray (almost black) diamond-plate pattern (evoking a "metallic" or "industrial" feel, common in gaming/PC builds).  
  - **Central Image**: A sleek, open PC case with red LED lighting (RGB fans, a glowing circular component, and internal wiring) – the focal point of the banner.  
  - **Peripheral Devices**: To the right of the PC, there’s a black gaming mouse, a white over-ear headset, a small webcam, and a backlit RGB keyboard (with red, green, blue, and yellow keys).  
  - **Branding**: The "MEXX" logo (red "M" + black "EXX") appears in the top-left corner (above the navigation bar) and bottom-right corner of the banner. A "TURBO ENVIOS" (Turbo Shipping) badge is in the bottom-left, featuring a white "TURBO" text with a red underline and "ENVIOS" in smaller white text.  

- **Text/Copy**:  
  - **Primary Headline**: Large, bold, white sans-serif text: *"ARMÁ TU PC"* (Build Your PC) – dominating the left side of the banner.  
  - **Call-to-Action (CTA) Button**: A bright red rectangular button with white, bold text: *"COMENZÁ ACA"* (Start Here) – positioned below the headline, slightly overlapping the PC image.  

- **Layout Structure**:  
  - The PC image is centered, with peripheral devices arranged to the right (creating a balanced, tech-focused composition).  
  - Text is left-aligned for hierarchy, with the CTA button drawing immediate attention.  
  - Navigation arrows (left/right) are dark gray circles with white arrows, placed at the far left/right edges of the banner.  


### 2) Promotional Info Bars  
No dedicated "info bars" (e.g., shipping/payment badges) are visible in the screenshot. The only promotional element is the "TURBO ENVIOS" badge integrated into the hero banner (bottom-left), which emphasizes fast shipping.  


### 3) Content Below the Hero  
Directly below the hero section, there is a **white space** (likely a placeholder or the start of a product grid/category section). The screenshot cuts off here, but the layout suggests a clean, uncluttered transition to the main content (e.g., product categories or featured items).  


### 4) Overall Design Style and Color Scheme  
- **Design Style**:  
  - **Gaming/Tech Aesthetic**: The design leans into a "hardcore" gaming vibe, with bold typography, high-contrast colors, and imagery of PC components/peripherals.  
  - **Minimalist Navigation**: The top navigation bar is simple and functional, with a focus on usability.  
  - **Responsive Layout**: The full-width banner and centered PC image suggest a responsive design optimized for desktop (and likely mobile) viewing.  

- **Color Scheme**:  
  - **Primary Colors**:  
    - **Red**: Dominant (used for the "MEXX" logo, CTA button, "TURBO ENVIOS" badge, and PC LED lighting) – evokes energy and urgency.  
    - **Black/Gray**: Used for the background (diamond-plate pattern, navigation bar) – provides contrast and a "sleek" tech feel.  
    - **White**: Used for text (headlines, CTA button text, "TURBO ENVIOS" text) – ensures readability against dark backgrounds.  
  - **Accent Colors**:  
    - **RGB (Red/Green/Blue)**: Visible in the keyboard’s backlighting and PC fans – reinforces the gaming theme.  
    - **White**: Used for the headset and mouse – adds visual balance to the dark/gray palette.  

- **Typography**:  
  - **Headline**: Bold, sans-serif font (likely a geometric style, e.g., Arial Black or similar) – maximizes visibility and impact.  
  - **Navigation/Body Text**: Clean, sans-serif font (e.g., Arial or Helvetica) – ensures readability in the top navigation bar.  


### Key Takeaways  
The homepage prioritizes **action** (via the "ARMÁ TU PC" CTA) and **brand identity** (via the "MEXX" logo and gaming imagery). The color scheme and layout are tailored to appeal to tech-savvy, gaming-oriented users, with a focus on clarity and visual hierarchy. The hero section effectively communicates the store’s core offering (PC building) while showcasing products and promoting fast shipping.
